inputs.description: No input required. Returns core data warehouse schemas.

apps.name: apps
apps.description: Debug tool for testing MCP Apps SDK.

message.description: Optional message to include in the debug data

eventName.description: The name of the event to update (e.g. "$pageview", "user_signed_up")

description.description: Description explaining when the event is triggered

tags.description: Tags to organize events by product area (e.g. "checkout", "onboarding") or user journey stage (e.g. "acquisition", "activation", "monetization", "retention")

verified.description: Mark as verified to indicate the event is properly instrumented and tracking correctly

hidden.description: Mark event as no longer used/captured. Hides it from UI while preserving historical data

data.description: The event definition data to update

list.name: list
list.description: List all event definitions in the project with optional filtering.

name.description: Experiment name - should clearly describe what is being tested

description.description: Detailed description of the experiment hypothesis, what changes are being tested, and expected outcomes

feature_flag_key.description: Feature flag key (letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores only). IMPORTANT: First search for existing feature flags that might be suitable using the feature-flags-get-all tool, then suggest reusing existing ones or creating a new key based on the experiment name

primary_metrics.description: Primary metrics to measure experiment success. IMPORTANT: Each metric needs event_name to track data. For funnels, provide funnel_steps array with event names for each step. Ask user what events they track, or use project-property-definitions to find available events.

metric_type.description: Metric type: 'mean' for average values (revenue, time spent), 'funnel' for conversion flows, 'ratio' for comparing two metrics

event_name.description: REQUIRED for metrics to work: PostHog event name (e.g., '$pageview', 'add_to_cart', 'purchase'). For funnels, this is the first step. Use '$pageview' if unsure. Search project-property-definitions tool for available events.

funnel_steps.description: For funnel metrics only: Array of event names for each funnel step (e.g., ['product_view', 'add_to_cart', 'checkout', 'purchase'])

properties.description: Event property filters as an array, e.g. [{ key: "$browser", value: "Chrome", operator: "exact", type: "event" }]

description.description: What this metric measures and why it's important for the experiment

secondary_metrics.description: Secondary metrics to monitor for potential side effects or additional insights. Each metric needs event_name.

metric_type.description: Metric type: 'mean' for average values, 'funnel' for conversion flows, 'ratio' for comparing two metrics

event_name.description: REQUIRED: PostHog event name. Use '$pageview' if unsure.

funnel_steps.description: For funnel metrics only: Array of event names for each funnel step

properties.description: Event property filters as an array, e.g. [{ key: "$browser", value: "Chrome", operator: "exact", type: "event" }]

variants.description: Experiment variants. If not specified, defaults to 50/50 control/test split. Ask user how many variants they need and what each tests

split_percent.description: Percentage of traffic allocated to this variant (0-100). All variants must sum to 100. One of split_percent (recommended) or rollout_percentage (deprecated) must be provided per variant.

rollout_percentage.description: Deprecated: use split_percent instead. Accepted for backward compatibility.

minimum_detectable_effect.description: Minimum detectable effect in percentage. Lower values require more users but detect smaller changes. Suggest 20-30% for most experiments

filter_test_accounts.description: Whether to filter out internal test accounts

target_properties.description: Properties to target specific user segments (e.g., country, subscription type)

draft.description: Create as draft (true) or launch immediately (false). Recommend draft for review first

holdout_id.description: Holdout group ID if this experiment should exclude users from other experiments

allow_unknown_events.description: Suppresses the validation that rejects metrics referencing events not yet ingested by this project. REQUIRES explicit user confirmation before being set to true — never flip this silently to retry a failed call. The default validation catches typo'd event names and missing instrumentation. Set this to true only when the user has confirmed the event is intentional (e.g. they are about to instrument it).

results.name: results
results.description: Get comprehensive experiment results including metrics and exposure data.

id.description: The ID of the experiment to get comprehensive results for

refresh.description: Force refresh of results instead of using cached values. Defaults to false.

experimentId.description: The ID of the experiment to update

metric_type.description: Metric type: 'mean' for average values, 'funnel' for conversion flows, 'ratio' for comparing two metrics

funnel_steps.description: For funnel metrics only: Array of event names for each funnel step

properties.description: Event property filters as an array, e.g. [{ key: "$browser", value: "Chrome", operator: "exact", type: "event" }]

funnel_steps.description: For funnel metrics only: Array of event names

properties.description: Event property filters as an array, e.g. [{ key: "$browser", value: "Chrome", operator: "exact", type: "event" }]

minimum_detectable_effect.description: Update minimum detectable effect in percentage

launch.description: Launch experiment (set start_date) or keep as draft

restart.description: Restart concluded experiment as draft (clears start_date, end_date, and conclusion)

data.description: The experiment data to update using user-friendly format

get.description: Fetches the total LLM daily costs for each model for a project over a given number of days.
